creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-05-27 10:40:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/postfix-policyd-weight Makefile distinfo 
    mail/postfix-policyd-weight/files pkg-message.in 
                                      policyd-weight.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.14.5
  
  From Changelog:
          0.1.14.4
          - DNS Errors were not handled correctly. May lead to a DoS.
          - DNS Error responses were subsequently concatenated
  
          0.1.14.5
          - 'A' lookups were not performed if 'MX' lookups returned NXDOMAIN
          (introduced in 0.1.14.4)
          - Detection Regex of dynamic clients corrected
          - man 8 policyd-weight minor changes to reflect MTA states
  
  PR:             112567
  Submitted by:   Robert Felber <robtone@ek-muc.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.11      +4 -5      ports/mail/postfix-policyd-weight/Makefile
  1.11      +3 -3      ports/mail/postfix-policyd-weight/distinfo
  1.5       +6 -3      ports/mail/postfix-policyd-weight/files/pkg-message.in
  1.3       +3 -3      ports/mail/postfix-policyd-weight/files/policyd-weight.in
